subject: [PATCH v2 06/10] nfsd: revoke copy-notify stateids before dropping their reference

2026-07-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a use-after-free bug in the nfsd kernel module by introducing a new function, revoke_cpntf_state_locked(), which unhashes copy-notify stateids from the IDR and their parent stid's list before dropping their reference. This ensures that the entry is not freed while still held by a reader, preventing a KASAN-detectable use-after-free error. The patch also updates the three revoke paths to use this new function, which fixes the bug and makes the code more robust.
